title: rubus × marginum
intro: Rubus × marginum, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant's leaves, roots, and fruits contain medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × marginum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Rubus × marginum often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, high blood pressure, and other conditions.
